title: Replication & Net Driver
description: Master Actor replication, variable replication, RepNotifies, and Remote Procedure Calls (RPCs) in Unreal Engine.
learningObjectives: Replicate actors and variables across the server-client pipeline
Implement RepNotify callbacks to trigger local visual updates on value changes
Execute Remote Procedure Calls (Server, Client, Multicast) with reliability configurations

sections.title: Variable Replication and Remote Calls
sections.content:
Replication syncs state parameters. Variable replication copies server variables to client copies. A `RepNotify` binds a local client function to execute automatically when a replicated variable is updated. Remote Procedure Calls (RPCs) are network functions:

1. **Server RPC**: Called by client, executed on server.
2. **Client RPC**: Called by server, executed on owning client.
3. **Multicast RPC**: Called by server, executed on all connected clients.

sections.title: Declaring Replicated Variables and Server RPCs
